Introducing Blacky

An AI as unique as
your dog. Because it
is your dog.

Blacky learns your dog's personality, health patterns and daily rhythm — then builds a voice that sounds like them, watches over them, and stays with you wherever you go.

  • → Continuous health monitoring: heart rate, temperature, sleep and activity — tailored to your dog, not the breed average.
  • → Instant alerts for changes that matter, with simple explanations you and your vet can act on.
  • → Built-in GPS, safe zones and night mode — they call you when something is wrong.
  • → An AI companion that learns your dog's personality — and stays with you all day, not sitting at home on a shelf.

Free shipping · 60-day returns · 3 months Premium included · Cancel anytime

Blacky · Right now
"Good morning! Slept 8 hours. Ready for our walk — are you?"
Not magic.
Science.

Blacky reads your dog's heart rate, body temperature, movement and sleep patterns — then uses AI trained on millions of data points to translate what it finds into clear, human language. It learns your specific dog's baseline in the first 7 days. After that, every alert is personal — not generic.

Everything Blacky does

Built around one idea.
Your dog is one of a kind.

AI Core
  • AI that learns your dog — emotion, habits and health, 24/7.
  • Translates movement and health patterns into one clear voice.
  • Builds a unique voice for each dog, based on real daily data.
The Dog's Voice
  • A digital voice that sounds like your dog — from the collar, at any moment.
  • A built-in speaker that voices what your dog feels, not what you say.
  • The collar speaks in your dog's voice, based on what they are experiencing.
Health Monitoring
  • Continuous monitoring of heart rate, breathing, temperature, sleep and activity — calibrated to your dog.
  • Advanced sensors that detect change before it becomes a problem.
  • Near real-time health insights, delivered directly to the app.
Sensors & Hardware
  • Next-generation sensors — precise enough for vets, simple enough for every owner.
  • A non-invasive sensor array that measures what the eye cannot see.
  • Acceleration, heart rate, breathing, temperature and state — in one minimalist collar.
Built-in Camera
  • A collar camera that sees what your dog sees.
  • Live video stream from the collar, directly to your phone.
  • A discreet collar camera for capturing your dog's everyday world.
GPS & Safe Freedom
  • Real-time GPS with virtual fences and exit alerts.
  • Precise location of your dog at any moment, on any screen.
  • Integrated GPS that gives your dog freedom and gives you peace of mind.
App & Experience
  • Everything your dog "says" — in one clean app.
  • One dashboard for emotion, health and location.
  • Smart alerts only when something truly needs your attention.
Privacy & Trust
  • End-to-end encrypted data, owned by you alone.
  • Designed like a health product, worn like an everyday collar.
Design & Comfort
  • Minimalist design, lightweight, comfortable for your dog all day long.
  • Premium materials, water-resistant and built for real dog life.
Your dog speaks

Not waiting to be asked.
Just telling you.

Blacky monitors your dog around the clock and speaks up the moment something needs your attention — in their own voice, in plain language.

Basic needsDaily Check-in
Bowl empty for 2 hours
"I am really thirsty. Could someone fill my bowl? I have been waiting since this morning."
Health alertHealth Alert
Heart rate elevated 3 nights
"My heart has been beating a little fast at night. It might be worth mentioning to the vet."
Daily needsBehavior
No walk in 3 days
"We have not been for a walk in three days. My legs are getting restless. Can we go out?"
TemperatureHealth Alert
Body temp above normal
"I am feeling quite hot today. Could we find somewhere cooler or get some extra water?"
RemindersVet Report
Vaccination overdue
"My annual vaccine was due last week. I know these things are easy to forget — but important."
Night checkSafety
Restless at 3am
"I woke up at 3am. A little anxious. Nothing urgent — just wanted you to know I am here."
Health · Real-time monitoring

A full checkup,
every second.

Blacky learns what is normal for your specific dog. When something shifts, it speaks up — days before visible symptoms appear.

Heart Rate78bpm
Calm today.
Temperature38.5°C
Normal range.
Activity2.1km
Needs a walk.
Sleep8.4hrs
Slept well.
"My heart rate has been elevated for three nights. Worth mentioning to the vet."
Voice · AI Assistant

An AI that knows your dog.
Not dogs in general. Yours.

Not like Alexa sitting at home. Blacky goes everywhere — on runs, in the car, at the park. Just say the name.

Blacky doesn't sit on top of your dog like an assistant. It becomes your dog's voice — learning their personality, health and daily rhythm until the voice is genuinely theirs. When Max speaks, that is Max.

Trained on millions of dogs.
Tuned to yours.

In the first 7 days, Blacky observes your dog's baseline — how they move, sleep, breathe and react. Then it builds a voice and personality profile unique to them.

A lazy Bulldog sounds different from a hyperactive Border Collie. And after a month, Blacky knows the difference between your Border Collie's excited sprint and their anxious pace.

→Personality voice — playful, calm, dramatic, gentle. Shaped by your dog's actual behavior.
→Personal rhythm — learns when they wake, eat, nap and need a walk. Reminds you before they have to ask.
→Mood awareness — notices when something feels off, even if they seem fine.
"Max, wake me up at 7.""Done. I'll be at your pillow at 6:58, judging you quietly."
"Max, how are you feeling today?""Pretty good actually. Walked a lot, napped twice. Heart felt calm all day."
"Max, I'll be home late tonight.""Okay. I'll probably pace a little — I always do — but I'll be fine. Just come home."
"Max, what's the weather like outside?""23 degrees, sunny. I've been staring at the door for 40 minutes. I think you already know what I want."
The App · Web & Mobile

From anywhere
in the world.

Live health dashboard
Heart rate, temperature, activity and sleep — updated in real time, from any browser, anywhere in the world.
Talk from anywhere
Type or record a message — Blacky delivers it in your dog's own voice, whether you are at work or abroad.
Vet reports, automatically
A weekly health summary sent to your vet before every visit. Full timeline, no effort required.
Smart reminders
Vaccinations, medications, check-ups — Blacky tracks them all and reminds you before it is too late.
Remote · Away from home

At work, abroad,
still connected.

Check vitals, send a voice message, see live location — from any device, any country, any time zone.

"Your owner says they will be home in one hour and they love you very much."
GPS · Safety

Does not get lost.
Calls you.

Not a passive GPS ping. If Blacky leaves the safe zone, the collar calls you directly. And if someone finds them — Blacky speaks for itself.

Lost mode · A stranger approaches
"Hi — I am Mochi. I think I wandered too far. Could you help me get home? Calling my owner right now."
Safety · Night Mode

Visible at night.
Heard when it matters.

After dark, the collar activates an ambient safety glow — visible from 200 meters. If something is wrong, Blacky speaks up immediately.

"I woke up at 3am. A little anxious. Just wanted you to know."
Health alert · 03:14
"Heart rate elevated for 20 minutes. Everything else looks normal. Watching it."
The Collar

Designed to disappear.

Biothane Military Grade. Ceramic-coated steel. A single black sensor dot. Nothing unnecessary. Everything essential.

Materials & Technology

Built to last.
Made to wear.

BandBiothane Military Grade · Matte White or Midnight Black
Hardware316L Stainless Steel · Ceramic matte coating
Voice3-mic array · 360° ambient speaker

Battery60-day battery life · Magnetic USB-C charging
ResistanceIP68 · 1.5m submersion · Sweat and mud proof
Weight24g · Fits 5–40kg · Available in 3 sizes
